controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Do you have risk-based systems and controls to be reasonably satisfied that a registered co-operative exists and that the chairman, secretary or equivalent officer names have been provided?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls
controls.remediation: Your Customer Due Diligence for Co-operatives process does not include the mandatory risk-based systems and controls to verify co-operative existence and officer details. Update your process to include controls designed to be reasonably satisfied that the co-operative exists and that the names of the chairman, secretary or equivalent officer have been provided, as required under rules 4.7.2, 4.7.2(1), and 4.7.2(2).

controls.label: Do you collect the minimum KYC information required for registered co-operatives?

items.label: Full address of the co-operative's registered office
Full address of the co-operative's principal place of operations
Residential address of the co-operative's secretary
Residential address of the co-operative's president (if no secretary)
Residential address of the co-operative's treasurer (if no secretary)

checklist-items.label: Unique identifying number issued upon registration (by State, Territory or overseas body)
Full name of the chairman or equivalent officer
Full name of the secretary or equivalent officer
Full name of the treasurer or equivalent officer

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not include all minimum required data fields for registered co-operatives. Update your procedure to collect the full name of the co-operative, the full address of its registered office, principal place of operations, or the residential address of its secretary/president/treasurer, the unique identifying registration number, and the full names of the chairman, secretary, and treasurer (or equivalent officers), as required under rules 4.7.3(1) through 4.7.3(4).

controls.label: Do you have risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect additional KYC information beyond the minimum required?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for additional KYC collection
controls.remediation: Your Customer Due Diligence for Co-operatives process does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information should be collected. Update your process to include risk-based controls that assess whether information beyond the minimum required should be collected for each registered co-operative, as required under rule 4.7.4.

controls.label: Do you verify the full name and unique identifying registration number of registered co-operatives from approved sources?

checklist-items.label: Unique identifying number issued upon registration

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Information procedure does not ensure verification of the full name and unique identifying registration number of co-operatives. Update your procedure to verify at minimum the full name and unique identifying registration number from approved sources such as ASIC, the relevant State/Territory/overseas registration body, co-operative registers, certified copies, reliable and independent documents, or reliable and independent electronic data, as required under rules 4.7.5(1) and 4.7.5(2).

controls.label: Do you have risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to verify additional KYC information beyond the minimum required?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based assessment process for additional KYC verification
controls.remediation: Your Customer Due Diligence for Co-operatives process does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information should be verified. Update your process to include risk-based controls that assess whether information beyond the minimum required should be verified for each registered co-operative, as required under rule 4.7.6.

controls.label: Do your verification procedures use approved methods (co-operative registers, certified copies, meeting minutes, State/Territory/overseas registration body sources, reliable and independent documents or electronic data)?
controls.detail-label: Describe the verification methods you use

items.label: Minutes of co-operative meetings or certified copies/extracts
Information from State, Territory or overseas registration body
Reliable and independent documents relating to the co-operative

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Information procedure does not specify approved verification methods for co-operatives. Update your procedure to require that verification is based on at least one of the following: co-operative registers or certified copies/extracts, meeting minutes or certified copies/extracts, information from the State/Territory/overseas registration body, reliable and independent documents, or reliable and independent electronic data, as required under rule 4.7.7.

controls.label: Do you permit the use of disclosure certificates to verify co-operative information when other sources are not reasonably available?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Information procedure does not permit the use of disclosure certificates as an alternative verification method. Update your procedure to allow the use of disclosure certificates to verify co-operative information when the information is not otherwise reasonably available from approved sources, provided the certificate is used for the purposes of customer identification, as required under rules 4.7.8(1) and 4.7.8(2).

controls.label: Do you have risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies in co-operative information verification?
controls.detail-label: Describe your discrepancy response procedures and risk assessment
controls.remediation: Your Customer Due Diligence for Co-operatives process does not include risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies. Update your process to include controls that address any discrepancies in verified information and allow you to determine whether you remain reasonably satisfied about the existence of the co-operative and the accuracy of officer names, as required under rule 4.7.9.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to be reasonably satisfied about co-operative existence and officer details.

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Collection of minimum required KYC information for registered co-operatives.

groups.title: Additional KYC Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based assessment of whether to collect and verify additional KYC information beyond minimum requirements.

groups.title: Verification of Information
groups.description: Verification of minimum required KYC information using approved sources.

groups.title: Verification Methods
groups.description: Approved methods and sources for verifying co-operative information, including disclosure certificate procedures.

groups.title: Responding to Discrepancies
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to address discrepancies identified during verification.
